session.user:
Run the following commands and report results:
1. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/wt/ -v 2>&1` 2. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/wt/ 2>&1` 3. `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/wt/ 2>&1`
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
Report all output including any errors or failures.
